segment.source: Renders a two-column layout: heading, rich-text intro and the embedded Desiderio contact form (TYPO3 Form Framework) on the left, one large side image on the right. Use it for: contact or landing sections pairing a short welcoming pitch with a message form and a photo — office shot, team portrait, storefront. Prefer 'Contact Form Block' when structured details (address, phone, email) must appear beside the form; 'Contact Info' when no form is needed.
